# velia_server_group (Data Source)

Reads a server group in Velia.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "velia_server_group" "test" {
  id = "23"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Server group ID returned by Velia.

### Read-Only

- `color` (String) Server group color.
- `name` (String) Server group name.
- `servers` (List of Number) List of server IDs in the group.
